required_fields.label: Court
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., U.S. District Court, District of Massachusetts

required_fields.label: Scope of discovery to summarize
required_fields.placeholder: Describe what categories of discovery materials need to be summarized (documents, depositions, interrogatories, etc.)...

required_fields.label: Key issues in the case
required_fields.placeholder: List the primary legal and factual issues the discovery relates to...

optional_fields.label: Key deponents
optional_fields.placeholder: Names and roles of key deponents...

optional_fields.label: Approximate document volume
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., 5,000 documents, 200 pages of deposition transcripts

optional_fields.label: Privilege or sensitivity concerns
optional_fields.placeholder: Note any privilege log issues or sensitive materials...

optional_fields.label: Upcoming deadlines
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., Summary judgment motion due April 15

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload discovery documents, deposition transcripts, or interrogatory responses
Upload the complaint, answer, or other key pleadings for context
Upload firm letterhead or brand guidelines (optional)

sections.label: Executive Summary
sections.instructions: Provide a high-level overview of the discovery reviewed, key findings, and their significance to the case. Written for a senior partner who needs a quick briefing.

sections.label: Discovery Overview
sections.instructions: Catalog the types and volume of discovery reviewed. Include production dates, custodians, and any gaps or outstanding requests.

sections.label: Document Review Findings
sections.instructions: Organize document review results by issue or category. Highlight smoking gun documents, key admissions, and patterns. Reference specific exhibit numbers.

sections.label: Deposition Highlights
sections.instructions: Summarize key testimony from each deponent organized by topic. Include exact quotes with transcript citations for critical admissions or contradictions.

sections.label: Key Evidence Catalog
sections.instructions: Create a prioritized list of the most significant evidence supporting and undermining the client's position. Rate each item by strength and relevance.

sections.label: Chronological Timeline
sections.instructions: Construct a fact timeline from the discovery materials showing the sequence of key events with supporting evidence citations.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.instructions: Provide strategic recommendations based on the discovery review. Identify areas needing further investigation, potential motion topics, and trial themes.
